# Outlook Power Tools

> Chrome extension that restores missing features to New Outlook (OWA): email templates, quick steps, keyboard shortcuts, and attachment reminder.

## Pages

- [Homepage](https://outlookpowertools.com/): Features, pricing, download
- [Privacy Policy](https://outlookpowertools.com/privacy.html): Data handling, what we collect and don't
- [Chrome Web Store](https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/outlook-power-tools): Install the extension

## Key Facts

- Works on: outlook.live.com, outlook.office.com, outlook.office365.com
- Free plan: 3 templates, 3 quick steps, 3 keyboard shortcuts, attachment reminder
- Pro: $3.99/month or $29.99/year — unlimited everything
- Data storage: local (chrome.storage), no email content collected
- Payment: PayPal subscriptions
